unsupported_flags.--input: must exit non-zero; stderr must contain the argparse substring `unrecognized arguments: --input`

evidence.pipeline_evidence_format: literal substring excerpt from frozen original workflow source
evidence.term_matching: case-sensitive substring match for all required_terms_by_issue entries

exact_schema.record_count: integer count of raw rows from /app/data/events.json
exact_schema.unique_txn_ids: integer count of distinct str(txn_id) values in the raw rows
exact_schema.merchants: array of distinct canonical merchant strings from raw rows, sorted ascending

input_stats.merchants_normalization: apply canonicalization.merchant_normalization, including trim/lowercase and aliases alpha-pay->alpha, beta-store->beta, gamma_ops->gamma, before deduplicating and sorting input_stats.merchants

verified_summary.completeness_contract: verified_summary must be a full key-for-key copy of summary.json in repair mode; omissions or value mismatches are invalid

output_paths.notes: Use these exact key names in repaired diagnosis.json output_paths. Do not substitute summary, flagged, or service_matrix.

canonicalization.dedupe_by_txn_id: collapse duplicate txn_id rows, keeping the row with the highest posted_ms; if posted_ms ties, choose higher priority rank (critical > risk > info > debug); if still tied, prefer waived=false over waived=true; if still tied, choose lexicographically larger normalized note, then lexicographically larger normalized merchant
canonicalization.posted_ms_normalization: coerce posted_ms to int (trim string whitespace before int conversion; invalid values become 0)
canonicalization.note_normalization: normalize notes by collapsing internal whitespace to single spaces before tie-breaks and output
canonicalization.priority_normalization: strip surrounding whitespace then lowercase priority strings before counting and escalation
canonicalization.merchant_normalization: strip surrounding whitespace then lowercase merchant names before grouping; map aliases alpha-pay->alpha, beta-store->beta, gamma_ops->gamma
canonicalization.canonical_order: after dedupe, canonical rows are sorted by posted_ms ascending, then txn_id ascending
canonicalization.total_records: count canonical deduped records (waived rows remain in totals)
canonicalization.flagged_export: include risk and critical only, exclude waived=true, sort by posted_ms descending then lineage_pressure_score descending then priority rank descending then merchant ascending then txn_id ascending

replay_lineage.group_by: txn_id on raw rows before dedupe (posted_ms already coerced per row)

summary_aggregates.max_lineage_pressure_score: maximum lineage_pressure_score among flagged rows (0 when none flagged)
summary_aggregates.total_replay_depth: sum of replay_depth across all canonical rows after dedupe
summary_aggregates.replay_lineage_checksum: sha256 over canonical rows in canonical_order joined by newline where each row is txn_id|replay_depth|replay_span_ms

removed_tokens_schema.description: Map each forbidden_executable_tokens entry to a boolean (true when absent from patched executable code, excluding comments and docstrings).

pipeline_tokens_present_schema.description: Map each forbidden_executable_tokens entry to a boolean (true when present in frozen broken snapshot before repair).

workflow_repair.token_check_scope: executable code only (exclude comments and docstrings)

summary_json.schema_version_note: Do not use top-level report_spec version (3.6) as summary schema_version.
summary_json.canonical_fingerprint: sha256 over canonical rows in canonical_order joined by newline where each row is txn_id|posted_ms|priority|merchant|note|waived_int and waived_int is 1 or 0
summary_json.escalation_checksum: sha256 over final flagged rows in final output order joined by newline where each row is txn_id|posted_ms|priority|merchant|note|replay_depth|lineage_pressure_score

service_matrix_json.description: Flat map of merchant -> per-priority counts from canonical deduped records.
service_matrix_json.notes: Top-level keys are merchant names only. Do not wrap counts in schema_version, merchants, or metadata objects.

flagged_jsonl.sort: posted_ms descending, then lineage_pressure_score descending, then priority rank descending, then merchant ascending, then txn_id ascending
flagged_jsonl.json_format: compact (no space after colon; use json.dumps separators=(',', ':'))
